# Gas Deviation Factor

**Summary**: A factor that accounts for the non-ideal behavior of real gases.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017]] calculated gas deviation factors using various correlation models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017]] Essential for calculating gas density and pressure in wellbores.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017]] Calculated using DAK, Brill & Beggs, or Mahmoud correlations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The top node method was accurate in predicting the static bottom-hole pressures. ([[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017, p. 13]])
